tool_output.output:
Here is the extracted data on Netflix's Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership (ARPU) from the article, covering 2019 to 2024. The article provides **monthly ARPU** figures only (not annual), plus a key percentage change.

### Global (Worldwide) Monthly ARPU

| Year | Monthly ARPU (USD) |
|------|--------------------|
| 2019 | $10.82 |
| 2020 | $10.91 |
| 2021 | $11.67 |
| 2022 | $11.76 |
| 2023 | $11.64 |
| 2024 | $11.70 |

- **Percentage change (2019 to 2024):** +35.89% increase.

---

### Regional Monthly ARPU Breakdown (2019–2024)

#### US & Canada (UCAN)

| Year | Monthly ARPU (USD) |
|------|--------------------|
| 2019 | $12.57 |
| 2020 | $13.32 |
| 2021 | $14.56 |
| 2022 | $15.86 |
| 2023 | $16.28 |
| 2024 | $17.26 |

#### Europe, Middle East & Africa (EMEA)

| Year | Monthly ARPU (USD) |
|------|--------------------|
| 2019 | $10.33 |
| 2020 | $10.72 |
| 2021 | $11.63 |
| 2022 | $10.99 |
| 2023 | $10.87 |
| 2024 | $11.11 |

#### Latin America (LATAM)

| Year | Monthly ARPU (USD) |
|------|--------------------|
| 2019 | $8.21 |
| 2020 | $7.45 |
| 2021 | $7.73 |
| 2022 | $8.48 |
| 2023 | $8.66 |
| 2024 | $8.00 |

#### Asia-Pacific (APAC)

| Year | Monthly ARPU (USD) |
|------|--------------------|
| 2019 | $9.24 |
| 2020 | $9.12 |
| 2021 | $9.56 |
| 2022 | $8.50 |
| 2023 | $7.64 |
| 2024 | $7.34 |

---

### Notes

- All figures are **monthly** average revenue per paying member. No annual ARPU figures are provided in the article.
- The only explicit percentage change given is the global increase of **35.89%** from 2019 to 2024.
- Regional comparisons (e.g., UCAN ARPU is 53.65% higher than LATAM in 2024) are noted in the article but not broken out as year-over-year percentage changes.
